name: DonaldJTrump.com
subject: Re: No response on file
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Can I get your thoughts on this, Peter? |
---
| | | | | | |

Peter,

**[Did you see the President's email asking you to take the Mainstream Media Accountability Survey?](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=93921d46b352f63f076d5e715bc86455b491bc2744fb23700c1b7929dd5e3af390e4803a4f203763a56a61297de99703) **

President Trump has been calling out the Fake News' lies and attacks every single day.[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=93921d46b352f63f52a7180182f939abb0043da6061f5d0504916c15ab7fcc848722a99f9d196e4d38b7c0924fad600b)_But now he wants to hear what American citizens have to say about the mainstream media._

**[Please take the Mainstream Media Accountability Survey today.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=93921d46b352f63f39899b34626abd1586cb818aa2b209385d805a2e2bcb5135fa494ce0d61a0b366028f12852ab8a13)**

Thanks,

Team TRUMP

**\---------- Forwarded Message ----------**
From: Donald J. Trump
Date: October 18, 2017
Subject: The media
To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=93921d46b352f63f35ed1e06d9e430db7fb13799e160266a261a0435a1ad4ae0f4a18ebede6b1bee33ea6d04891d9fcf)**

---
| [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=93921d46b352f63fd01812e9537270e7c6d70e8fd9c826e33a69835cf794c90d40fe633f88a7c35b1abcce9d906dc044)
---

Peter,

I've said it before and I will say it again:_**the Mainstream Media is out to bring down my Administration.**_

It's a 24/7 barrage of hit jobs, fake stories, and absolute hatred for everything we stand for as a movement.

It's time to once again release our Mainstream Media Accountability Survey to show them that the American people are fed up with the Fake News machine.

**[I need you to take the MEDIA ACCOUNTABILITY SURVEY to do your part to fight back against the fake news attacks and deceptions.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=93921d46b352f63f5e5a4172c4dfd63c53179838d169d5c11e4a4f1876490a67173441d0b3dfbea487e5f8f54aa40818)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=93921d46b352f63f15c650effcbdb8c45f3be79857767f3ea3e9f922ba461869b723beea44241ba3280e297009074e86)
They don't care about the truth. They don't care about what's right. They only care about propping up the liberal Democrats they worship and destroying anyone who wants to put America First.

There is nothing they won't do to stop us.

This is a fight we can't afford to lose. The future of America hangs in the balance. Our country is at stake.

**[Please take the Mainstream Media Accountability Survey to do your part to fight back against the media's attacks and deceptions.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=93921d46b352f63f12ee65dbaa170af7f4720c692e42310acd9a672a7229b4d3fb8e0a463b8098b59f551b2874884803)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=93921d46b352f63ff48a960fec90689d88e3cd60bee7c24c37ed420672645e79f366e0e018675d442771ca7239a581ed)
Donald J. Trump

[TAKE THE SURVEY](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=93921d46b352f63fa41aecad5be787d05c2778df7d6959ef734df089bc99a24d4132c333e6728ad4b84ca8ffedd2ab78)
---

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee. You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=93921d46b352f63fb041ad6fa46404e6486eb835830748c7080e9aa5ce68b38dc71a46fab8e6fd1b2168388f2004a979) | [Unsubscribe ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22abe9a403318647b4324c40729473cd21efb261903225d789c4627d803b6330da483384f4c0ba3938a0) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab291494658eff68202d789f94509d4846ea4d56ef602d38b68393332793fb86b07f77eb2d3dfc3cd6)
---

name: DNC Polling Update
subject: POLLING UPDATE: Alabama Senate special election
body:
Help elect Doug Jones in Alabama. **Split a donation between Doug Jones and the DNC to help elect Doug to the Senate and Democrats around the country.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523a2d/4067b0a/4491f6747/7e6446fd/3572120449/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Doug-Jones-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171021_dnc_rem&source=em_20171021_dnc_rem&refcode=em_20171021_dnc_rem")****
[](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523a2d/4067b0a/4491f6747/7e6446fa/3572120449/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/Doug-Jones-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20171021_dnc_rem&source=em_20171021_dnc_rem&refcode=em_20171021_dnc_rem") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523a2d/4067b0a/4491f6747/7e6446fb/3572120449/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/Doug-Jones-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em_20171021_dnc_rem&source=em_20171021_dnc_rem&refcode=em_20171021_dnc_rem") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523a2d/4067b0a/4491f6747/7e6446f8/3572120449/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/Doug-Jones-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=em_20171021_dnc_rem&source=em_20171021_dnc_rem&refcode=em_20171021_dnc_rem") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523a2d/4067b0a/4491f6747/7e6446f9/3572120449/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/Doug-Jones-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=em_20171021_dnc_rem&source=em_20171021_dnc_rem&refcode=em_20171021_dnc_rem") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523a2d/4067b0a/4491f6747/7e644686/3572120449/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/Doug-Jones-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=em_20171021_dnc_rem&source=em_20171021_dnc_rem&refcode=em_20171021_dnc_rem")

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523a2d/4067b0a/4491f6747/7e644681/3572120449/VEsHBg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20171021_dnc_rem&source=em_20171021_dnc_rem&refcode=em_20171021_dnc_rem"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523a2d/4067b0a/4491f6747/7e64468e/3572120449/VEsHAQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171021_dnc_rem&source=em_20171021_dnc_rem&refcode=em_20171021_dnc_rem"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523a2d/4067b0a/4491f6747/7e64468c/3572120449/VEsHAw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=16+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171021_dnc_rem&source=em_20171021_dnc_rem&refcode=em_20171021_dnc_rem"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Bre Andrews
subject: Will you vote for Joe?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
We need to know you're with us. |
---

| | | Peter,

My name's Bre -- said like the cheese -- and I recently joined Joe's campaign as his Digital Director. That means I'm responsible for online outreach and fundraising, which as we saw in 2016, can have a big impact on the election.

This election cycle is already heating up, and our efforts will make the difference between keeping Joe in the Senate fighting for Hoosiers, or electing a rubber stamp for the Trump/Pence agenda. That's why we need to know you're with us as early as possible.

**So we 're asking: _Can we count on you to turn out for Joe in 2018?_**
---
| [**Yes**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24c1/7377f838/34b16e2e/51fb878d/2059591978/VEsH/ "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/7KFXMV6")
---
| | [**No**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24c1/7377f838/34b16e2e/51fb878d/2059591978/VEsE/ "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/7KFXMV6")
---|---
Thank you,

Bre Andrews
Digital Director
Donnelly for Indiana

| [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24c1/7377f838/34b16e2e/51fb878c/2059591978/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-donate?refcode=20171021indb&amount=25")
---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24c1/7377f838/34b16e2e/51fb878f/2059591978/VEsC/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")

name: Team DWS
subject: We're angry
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Donald Trump, his Administration, and his Republican allies in Congress are methodically destroying all the progress we made under President Obama. [_**If you 're with Debbie, contribute now to stop them.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e15/622b7b5b/6a2ab74/307bd018/2884051299/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse171020?refcode=dwse171020_m&recurring=true&amount=5") They're relentless in their quest to repeal the Affordable Care Act. They're rolling back initiatives meant to combat climate change. They've put hundreds of thousands of DREAMers at risk of deportation. **Let's just be honest -- we're angry.** This is not the America we know and love. Our politics are being warped by a bigoted President and a backwards Republican Congress. Debbie is Trump's most outspoken critic. She's out there every day, making sure our progress doesn't get flushed down the drain. [_**Let's channel our anger into something constructive: A powerful grassroots organization fighting beside Debbie. Give $5, $10, or whatever you can to help us reach our $15,000 goal.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e15/622b7b5b/6a2ab74/307bd018/2884051299/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse171020?refcode=dwse171020_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you for taking action, Team DWS |

[Click here](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e15/622b7b5b/6a2ab74/307bd01b/2884051299/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

name: TimKaine.com
subject: Here's what you need to know about CHIP funding (add your name)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
| **CHIP, the Children's Health Insurance Program, insures 9 million kids across the country. And as of now, its funding has lapsed.[Add your name to say you support renewing CHIP funding as soon as possible.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=DMYCbW5Pm%2FKBICjvoVV6QBHjXGHDvLUS)**

**[ADD MY NAME](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=TpXehenNpDqo8HC7AP8xOxHjXGHDvLUS)**
---
Derek -- here's what you need to know about the program:

CHIP is a bipartisan effort that was created in 1997 to help provide more affordable health coverage for kids (and pregnant women) in lower income families.

Every so often, Congress must reauthorize programs like CHIP \-- and on September 30th, in the wake of yet another Republican effort to repeal the Affordable Care Act, CHIP's financing lapsed. If it's not renewed soon, states will begin to run out of the money they use to fund children's health insurance.

That's funding for kids' immunizations, routine check-ups, prescription medications, emergency services, inpatient and outpatient hospital visits, dental and vision care... just gone.

**This is not a partisan fight. It's simply about our commitment to caring for our country's kids.**

One thing we've learned over the past year is that everyone's voice can make a difference, but we can have an even greater impact if we speak up together. **[So if you agree that it's time to renew CHIP and save health insurance for 9 million children, sign your name today.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=u6%2FtoY9b%2FV4%2BNG7KrpTBcRHjXGHDvLUS)**

Thanks for your support.

-Team Kaine | | [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=72IzTDhNdG8r9MSJPPKmK2X0JDTKTVnX)
---
| Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Wo6eZlF9WySVGcrIxvh82BHjXGHDvLUS).
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: DSCC Polling Alert
subject: Fox News poll: "Doug Jones, Roy Moore are tied"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
A new poll shows Doug Jones and Roy Moore tied in the Alabama Senate special election. Let's help Doug and all our Democrats keep up the momentum.
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171021-PollAlert-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
_**Fox News Senate poll: Doug Jones, Roy Moore are tied
[Help us fight for the Senate in every state, team. Pitch in immediately >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171021-PollAlert-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**_
Team, _Fox News_ released a poll that shows Doug Jones and Roy Moore are TIED in the Alabama Senate special election.

We still have a long way to go til we've got an upset on our hands, but this poll shows that Doug is fighting his heart out to defeat extremist GOP candidate Roy Moore -- and we've got to make sure he gets his message out to every single voter across the state.

[**Your contribution will send a clear message that Democrats will fight for the Senate in EVERY state and help give Doug the resources to run the strongest possible campaign against Roy Moore. Can we count on you to pitch in $1 immediately? >>**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171021-PollAlert-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

With less than two months til Election Day, an Alabama news outlet called this latest poll a "stunning development." While it's been more than two decades since a Democrat won a Senate seat in Alabama -- we're not willing to take anything for granted, not with Trump in the White House, and not with Doug putting in double the effort to win.

And if Doug can win this seat, it will send a powerful message that Democrats can win everywhere -- but it will take all of us stepping up to make it happen. With the special election right around the corner, it's critical that we take advantage of this moment.

[**Contribute $1 right now to help Doug capture the momentum in the Alabama special election, support Democrats all over the country, and send a bold message to the GOP about where we will fight.**](http://action.dscc. Thanks for stepping up,

Team DSCC

name: race-update@dscc.org
subject: "the more Moore is heard, the more Alabamians...begin to have doubts"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
As voters across Alabama hear just how extreme Roy Moore really is, our chances of pulling off an upset are improving.
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171021-RaceUpdate_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team -- have you heard the latest on the Alabama special election?

* First, a new poll this week showed Doug Jones tied with Moore.

* Then, a local pundit this week summed up the state of the Alabama special election as, "the more Moore is heard, the more Alabamians...begin to have doubts."

* Now, as voters across Alabama hear just how extreme Roy Moore really is, our chances of pulling off an upset are improving.

But whether or not we succeed in reaching voters will depend on whether supporters like you help Doug run the strongest campaign possible.

**Pitch in $1 now to help fund our organizing efforts in Alabama and nationwide to help get the word out about Roy Moore and extremist GOP candidates everywhere.**

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171021-RaceUpdate_DS-ProsHV&amount=1&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171021-RaceUpdate_DS-ProsHV&amount=5&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171021-RaceUpdate_DS-ProsHV&amount=15&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171021-RaceUpdate_DS-ProsHV&amount=25&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171021-RaceUpdate_DS-ProsHV&amount=35&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

****[Or donate another amount.](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171021-RaceUpdate_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

It's clear voters across Alabama are beginning to see that Roy Moore's extremist ideology is dangerously out of step.

Meanwhile, Doug is putting in the real, difficult work it will take to compete -- and it's up to us to show we have his back. That means helping him build a campaign strong enough to stand up to Moore's extremist rhetoric.

[**Contribute $1 right now to help give Doug Jones the resources he needs to keep up the momentum in Alabama, support all our Democratic candidates, and send a strong message to extremist Republicans across the country >>**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171021-RaceUpdate_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dd19/2b07114c/e73d7dec/7316a989/3987983522/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dd19/2b07114c/e73d7dec/7316a988/3987983522/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it.
